calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43 am and concluding at 9:49 am.

Plaintiff Atradius Trade Credit Insurance Inc. appearing represented by David Brand, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Teespring Inc. not appearing.

LAURA WECKESSER is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff's counsel presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the cross-complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Atradius Trade Credit Insurance Inc., and against Defendant Teespring Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $333,995.18
2. Prejudgment Interest: $39,531.60

(in Progress)

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $373,526.78

Proposed judgment signed and filed.(D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2023 Continued To Dec-06-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
